The '''Extragalactic Society''' (often referred to as simply '''ExGal''') was an institute devoted to the search for [[Extragalactic/Legends|life]] outside [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==History==
During the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], it was a member of the [[General Ministry Institutes]].<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|life/13314_1.html|Funding Slashed for General Ministry Institutes}}</ref>

Just before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the ExGal budget—along with the other General Ministry programs—was cut by 60%. This resulted in a greater use of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] exploration and a closing of several offices by the Society. Its president at this time was [[Tobbert Dalonbian]].<ref name="HNN" />

By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], ExGal had at least four [[Listening post/Legends|listening posts]], with [[ExGal-4]] located on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]]. It was that outpost that finally discovered extragalactic life, in the form of an approaching [[Praetorite Vong]] [[Da'Gara's worldship|ship]]. The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] subsequently destroyed ExGal-4 and killed all of its scientists, except for [[Danni Quee]].<ref name="VP">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref>
